creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed


I took a look at the ports.  It seems like all the subdirectories are 
shared.  So I think I'm going to put the real files only in one 
of the ports dir and have PKGDIR etc. pointing to that one. 

The only problem is, which one?  And then I realized that there is no 
editors/nvi port.  Could it be possible, that we make an editors/nvi 
port, that has multilingual support but not tied to a particular 
language?  (Kinda like editors/mule.)  Then we can use that port as 
the holding place of all the files. 

If not, I guess I'll just pick one (probably will be japanese/euc 
because that's what I use).
